ground_truth.description: run_verification() is an async function but the await keyword was removed. The variable 'verify' will be a coroutine object, not the result. All subsequent accesses to verify.passed, verify.lint_output, etc. will either AttributeError (coroutine has no 'passed' attribute) or always be truthy (coroutine object is truthy), producing incorrect metrics.
The new logging block accesses verify.passed etc. which will silently succeed if verify is a coroutine (coroutines are truthy), producing misleading log output rather than an error.
